task_completion.description: Verify that a mailing list named 'Eco-Conscious Interest Group' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the email marketing application, a list, audience, or group named exactly 'Eco-Conscious Interest Group' is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the contacts from the CSV were imported into the mailing list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Eco-Conscious Interest Group' list shows 3 subscribers, or there is a success message/screen indicating contacts (Sarah Green, David River, Eco Supplies HQ) were imported.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a new mailing with the correct subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email draft or campaign settings screen is visible with the subject line exactly 'Introducing our new Sustainable Bamboo Collection'.

task_completion.description: Verify the email body contains the required discount text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email composer or preview shows the text 'Use code BAMBOO25 for 25% off your first order' (or at least the code 'BAMBOO25') in the message body.

task_completion.description: Verify the mailing is scheduled for the correct time and date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The campaign scheduling interface shows the send time set to 09:00 AM and the date set to exactly 3 days from the current system date (which can be checked via the OS taskbar/clock).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the email marketing application's graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser or email marketing app UI being used to create the list and campaign, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV import feature was used to add contacts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the file upload dialog, import mapping screen, or import success screen for 'eco_leads.csv', rather than manually typing the contacts.

integrity.description: Verify the email draft and schedule are configured in the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The email composer and scheduling screens belong to the email marketing software, not a generic text editor or image editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target list name: 'Eco-Conscious Interest Group'. Expected contacts to be imported: exactly 3 (Sarah Green, David River, Eco Supplies HQ). Target subject: 'Introducing our new Sustainable Bamboo Collection'. Required body text must contain: 'BAMBOO25'. Schedule: exactly 09:00 AM, 3 days from the current system date.
